datasets.title: Datasets
datasets.uploadDesc: Upload your marketing data in CSV or Excel format. The file should contain time series data with date, spend, and response columns.
datasets.noDatasets: No datasets yet. Upload your first dataset to get started.
datasets.datasetNamePlaceholder: Enter a name for your dataset
datasets.datasetNameHelp: Give your dataset a descriptive name for easy identification
datasets.marketingSpend: Marketing spend columns (e.g., TV, digital, social)
datasets.historicalData: At least 52 weeks of historical data
datasets.dragDrop: Drag and drop your file here
datasets.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete the dataset "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.
datasets.columnsOverview: Overview of all columns in the dataset

exploration.title: Data Exploration
exploration.noSignificantCorrelations: No significant correlations found above threshold
exploration.needTwoNumericColumns: Need at least 2 numeric columns for correlation analysis
exploration.noMissingValues: No missing values in this dataset!

models.title: Models
models.noModels: No models yet. Create your first model to start analyzing.

types.olsDesc: Simple linear regression, best for interpretability
types.ridgeDesc: Regularized regression, recommended for most cases

models.basicConfigurationDesc: Set up the basic model parameters
models.selectVariablesDesc: Choose your target and marketing variables
models.dateColumnDesc: The time column used for ordering and time-series effects
models.targetVariableDesc: The outcome variable you want to model (e.g., sales, revenue)
models.marketingFeaturesDesc: Select the marketing spend variables to include in the model
models.configureTransformationsDesc: Set adstock and saturation parameters for each marketing variable
models.noFeaturesSelected: No features selected. Go back to select marketing variables.
models.adstockDesc: How marketing effects carry over time
models.decayRateDesc: 0 = no carryover, 1 = full carryover to next period
models.saturationDesc: How effectiveness decreases at higher spend levels
models.autoFitParametersDesc: Let the model determine optimal values
models.coefficientConstraintsDesc: Add business constraints to ensure sensible results
models.positiveMarketingEffectsDesc: Ensure all marketing coefficients are positive (spending more should not decrease sales)
models.roiBoundsDesc: Set minimum and maximum expected ROI for each channel
models.constraintsHelp: Constraints help ensure the model produces business-sensible results. For most marketing mix models, positive marketing effects are recommended.
models.reviewConfigurationDesc: Verify your model settings before creation
models.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete the model "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.

wizard.basicConfigDesc: Set up the basic model parameters
wizard.selectVariablesDesc: Choose your target and marketing variables
wizard.targetHelp: The outcome variable you want to model (e.g., sales, revenue)
wizard.marketingFeaturesHelp: Select the marketing spend variables to include in the model
wizard.configTransformationsDesc: Set adstock and saturation parameters for each marketing variable
wizard.noFeaturesSelected: No features selected. Go back to select marketing variables.
wizard.coefficientConstraintsDesc: Add business constraints to ensure sensible results
wizard.positiveEffectsDesc: Ensure all marketing coefficients are positive (spending more should not decrease sales)
wizard.roiBoundsDesc: Set minimum and maximum expected ROI for each channel
wizard.constraintsHelp: Constraints help ensure the model produces business-sensible results. For most marketing mix models, positive marketing effects are recommended.
wizard.reviewConfigDesc: Verify your model settings before creation

training.title: Training
training.statusDesc: Monitor the progress of your model training
training.monitorProgress: Monitor the progress of your model training

results.title: Results
results.actualVsFitted: Actual vs Fitted values over time
results.decompositionDesc: Stacked area chart showing channel contributions over time
results.contributionsDesc: Share of each channel in driving the target variable

optimization.title: Budget Optimization
optimization.noCompletedModels: No completed models available. Train a model first.

constraints.coefficientConstraintsDesc: Control the sign and range of model coefficients for each variable
constraints.contributionConstraintsDesc: Limit how much each variable can contribute to the total effect
constraints.applyPositiveToAll: Apply positive constraint to all marketing variables
constraints.applyPositiveToAllDesc: Ensure spending more does not decrease the target variable
constraints.noPerVariableConstraints: No custom coefficient constraints. The global setting above will apply.
constraints.noContributionConstraints: No contribution constraints defined. Add constraints to limit how much each variable can contribute.
constraints.contributionConflictWarning: Warning: The sum of minimum contributions exceeds 100% or sum of maximums is less than 100%. This may result in infeasible constraints.
constraints.groupConstraintsDesc: Set contribution constraints for variable groups defined in your project
constraints.noGroupsAvailable: No variable groups defined. Create groups in the project settings first.
constraints.noGroupConstraints: No group constraints defined. Add constraints to limit group contributions.
constraints.constraintSupportDesc: Coefficient and contribution constraints will be enforced during model training. Contribution constraints are automatically converted to coefficient bounds based on your data.

transformations.previewDesc: See how {{feature}} values change after applying transformations
transformations.noDataForPreview: Select a dataset to see the transformation preview

variableGroups.title: Variable Groups
variableGroups.description: Organize variables into logical groups for easier constraint management
variableGroups.noGroups: No variable groups defined. Create groups to organize your marketing variables.
variableGroups.noVariablesAvailable: No variables available. Upload a dataset first.
variableGroups.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete the group "{{name}}"?
variableGroups.dialogDescription: Create a group to organize related variables together
variableGroups.overlapWarning: Some variables appear in multiple groups:

priors.title: Prior Configuration
priors.description: Set prior distributions for Bayesian inference. Priors encode your beliefs about coefficient values.
priors.tooltip: Priors encode your beliefs about coefficient values before seeing the data. For MMM, half-normal priors are common to enforce positive coefficients.
priors.bayesianInfoDesc: For Bayesian models, use prior distributions instead of constraints. Half-normal priors ensure positive coefficients, which is typical for marketing variables.
priors.noCustomPriors: No custom priors configured. Default priors will be used.
priors.halfNormalDesc: Ensures positive coefficients (recommended for marketing variables)

distributions.normalDesc: Symmetric distribution, can be positive or negative
distributions.truncatedNormalDesc: Normal distribution bounded between lower and upper limits

scenarios.title: Scenarios
scenarios.noAdjustments: No adjustments added. Click "Add Variable" to create a what-if scenario.
scenarios.runCalculation: Run the calculation to see the scenario results.
scenarios.calculatingDesc: Please wait while we process the scenario.
scenarios.calculationFailedDesc: There was an error calculating this scenario.
scenarios.noScenariosDesc: Create a scenario to start what-if analysis.
scenarios.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this scenario?
scenarios.noCompletedModels: No completed models available. Train a model first.
